prompt: A colossal, serrated branch of electricity tears through the inky blackness, its incandescent tendrils splaying outward like a shattered spear. The sky is a deep, foreboding indigo, with not a cloud to be seen, only the stark, unrelenting darkness. A lone, distant light flickers from the far right, casting an otherworldly glow on the surrounding landscape. The beam is narrow and intense, illuminating a wispy tendril of fog that wafts lazily across the foreground. The light itself appears to be emanating from a distant, unseen source, casting long, ominous shadows across the ground. The atmosphere is charged with anticipation, as if the very air is electric with the promise of a storm. The camera is positioned low to the ground, looking up at the dramatic spectacle, with a wide-angle lens (14-24mm) to capture the full, sweeping majesty of the lightning branch. The color grading is muted, with a slight blue undertone to emphasize the drama and tension of the scene. The overall mood is one of awe-inspiring wonder, as if the viewer is witnessing a divine display of raw, unbridled power.
original_prompt: a spectacular branch of lightning burst from a pitch black sky a distant light shines from the far right
